question_pt: Quantos municipios existem e quantas UFs brasileiras validas aparecem na dimensao territorial?
sql: WITH valid_uf(sg_uf) AS (VALUES ('AC'), ('AL'), ('AP'), ('AM'), ('BA'), ('CE'), ('DF'), ('ES'), ('GO'), ('MA'), ('MT'), ('MS'), ('MG'), ('PA'), ('PB'), ('PR'), ('PE'), ('PI'), ('RJ'), ('RN'), ('RS'), ('RO'), ('RR'), ('SC'), ('SP'), ('SE'), ('TO')) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_municipios, COUNT(DISTINCT m.SG_UF) FILTER (WHERE v.sg_uf IS NOT NULL) AS total_ufs_validas, COUNT(DISTINCT m.SG_UF) FILTER (WHERE v.sg_uf IS NULL) AS total_codigos_sg_uf_invalidos FROM municipios m LEFT JOIN valid_uf v ON m.SG_UF = v.sg_uf
